## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between ProjectMark and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and optimization plans.](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality has improved drastically, with 10 new in-depth articles awaiting approval](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Focus shift to improving existing content, prioritizing articles with high impressions but low click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [New strategy: simultaneously produce new content while revamping old articles to align with current quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Upcoming additions: client case study banner and demo CTA to be integrated into blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality and Production

  - [Drastic improvement in article quality, especially with more technical topics](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [10 new in-depth articles sent to Tom for approval](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Current workflow involves Tom/Noel reviewing technical content; potential for future automation](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Publishing rate not yet at desired level, but steady growth in impressions (20,000+ this week)](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

### Performance Analysis

  - [57 clicks this week (up from 45 last week)](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [High impression count for certain articles, but very low click-through rates:](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - ["Construction industry leads": 23,642 impressions, 5 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - ["Ultimate construction CRM guide": 23,184 impressions, 14 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - ["SEO for construction companies": 17,000 impressions, 0 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

### Content Optimization Strategy

  - [Prioritize improving existing published articles, especially those with high impressions but low clicks](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Revamp older articles to match current quality standards (e.g., adding verified claims, improving structure)](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Continue producing new content while simultaneously updating old articles](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Focus on making titles more enticing and body content more comprehensive](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Ongoing metadata optimization for low click-through rate articles](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

### Upcoming Content Enhancements

  - [Designer creating banner for client case study](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Demo CTA to be added to blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Potential creation of downloadable checklists for relevant topics (e.g., pre-construction checklist)](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Ebook ideas to be revisited after prioritizing article improvements](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Publish the 10 new articles once approved by Tom](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Begin revamping old content, starting with high-impression, low-click articles identified in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Integrate new client case study banner and demo CTA into blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Continue producing new content while updating old articles](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Andrej to send an update on old article regeneration progress by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [Gus to send the client case study banner to Andrej when ready](https://fathom.video/share/v6ehG4wmsQRyF1CxYgucuRqA-ULLVspU?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
